name: karp-graph-lite
description: Self-evolving personal knowledge graph for Claude Desktop. Give Claude persistent memory with semantic search, visual graph UI, and self-evolving schema. Your data stays local.

data_path.title: Data Folder
data_path.description: Where your knowledge graph database will be stored. Choose any folder — your data stays on your machine.

ui_port.title: Web UI Port
ui_port.description: Port for the local web UI (default: 3456). Open localhost:3456 in your browser to view your graph.

ui_password.title: Web UI Password
ui_password.description: Protects your knowledge graph web UI with a passphrase. If left blank, the web UI will prompt you to set one (or trust localhost) on first visit.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store a memory, note, decision, todo, insight, or any custom type. Tags and connections optional.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Semantic search across your entire knowledge graph. Finds memories by meaning, not just keywords.

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a node from the knowledge graph by ID.

tools.name: update
tools.description: Edit an existing node's content, tags, or metadata.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Create a named relationship between two nodes (e.g. 'led_to', 'contradicts', 'part_of').

tools.name: search
tools.description: Keyword or exact match search across node summaries and details.

tools.name: list
tools.description: Browse nodes by type, tags, or date range. Returns summaries.

tools.name: kg_status
tools.description: Knowledge graph health: node counts by type, DB size, embedding coverage, last backup.

tools.name: propose_node_type
tools.description: Propose a new custom node type with fields. User confirms in the web UI before it's added.

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Create a backup snapshot of the entire knowledge graph.

tools.name: re_embed
tools.description: Rebuild all vector embeddings. Use after adding new types or if search quality degrades.
